movies.title: The Last Glitch
movies.synopsis: A hacker discovers a flaw in the global grid that allows him to edit reality temporarily. As corporations hunt him down to restore the "glitch," he must decide if reality is worth saving.

movies.title: Love in the Time of Algorithms
movies.synopsis: A cynical dating app developer and her rival fall for each other while coding an AI designed to predict true love, only to realizeize their own chemistry was pre-programmed.

movies.title: Shadow Protocol
movies.synopsis: When a black ops team is disavowed, their leader has to go rogue with a disgraced soldier to expose a conspiracy within the CIA before the truth is buried.

movies.title: Pixel Perfect
movies.synopsis: An outdated 8-bit sidekick must save the world from deletion by teaming up with a hyper-realistic 3D character who looks down on him.

movies.title: Echoes of Summer
movies.synopsis: An estranged father reunites with his teenage daughter for one last summer road trip to his childhood home, forcing them to confront memories they've both forgotten.

movies.title: The Heist in High Heels
movies.synopsis: A group of high-fashion models accidentally steal a nuclear briefcase during a runway show and have to use their skills in stealth and styling to get out of the city.

movies.title: Neon Hearts
movies.synopsis: Set in a rainy cyberpunk city, a street musician and a corporate heiress fall in love despite their worlds being strictly divided by a corporate firewall.

movies.title: Titan's Fall
movies.synopsis: Giant robots wake up from centuries of slumber only to find humanity has evolved. A young pilot bonds with a rogue machine to stop an ancient war from restarting.

movies.title: The Waiter's Secret
movies.synopsis: A waiter at a famous Michelin restaurant notices the ingredients in a specific table's order match the ingredients found at a crime scene.

movies.title: Double Take
movies.synopsis: A professional lookalike doubles for a celebrity during a scandal, but falls for the celebrity's agent and realizes the line between fake and real is blurry.

movies.title: Void Walker
movies.synopsis: An astronaut stranded in a pocket dimension of non-time discovers he can manipulate matter, but every change he makes erases a piece of his memory.

movies.title: The Wedding Planner's Nightmare
movies.synopsis: A perfectionist planner must organize a wedding where the groom's family, the bride's ex-boyfriend, and a rival florist are all present.

movies.title: Silent Witness
movies.synopsis: A deaf defense attorney takes on a case involving a wealthy heir accused of murder, where the key evidence relies entirely on his interpretation of body language.

movies.title: Cupid's Arrow
movies.synopsis: Two rival archers compete for a spot in the Olympics, but a training accident forces them to share an ambulance, leading to an unexpected connection.

movies.title: Skybound
movies.synopsis: In a world where gravity works in waves, a girl with a jetpack must deliver a cure to the stranded citizens of the "Down Town."

movies.title: The Director's Cut
movies.synopsis: A washed-up director tries to film one last masterpiece, but the lead actor is a method enthusiast who takes the script too literally, threatening the production budget.

movies.title: Red Line
movies.synopsis: A marathon runner finds himself in a chase during the London Marathon, with his past as a fugitive catching up to him in the crowd.

movies.title: Moonbeam Manor
movies.synopsis: Teen monsters try to run a bed and breakfast for tourists in a haunted house, but a human family moves in and refuses to move out.

movies.title: The Last Letter
movies.synopsis: A historian dedicates her life to finding the recipient of a mysterious love letter sent from the front lines of World War I.

movies.title: Speed Demon
movies.synopsis: A traffic cop who hates cars is forced to partner with a daredevil stunt driver to stop a criminal mastermind who hijacked all the drones in the city.

movies.title: Quantum Love
movies.synopsis: A physicist falls in love with a version of herself from a different timeline, forcing her to choose between saving the world and her love.

movies.title: Laugh Track
movies.synopsis: A stand-up comedian begins to hear his own laughter from the audience long after the show ends, driving him to the brink of paranoia.

movies.title: The Architect's Dream
movies.synopsis: An old architect rediscovers blueprints for a building that doesn't exist, leading him on a journey across three countries to find the foundation.

movies.title: Starstruck
movies.synopsis: A struggling fan wins a contest to meet her favorite K-Pop idol, only to realize he is suffering from a mental breakdown and she is his only anchor.

movies.title: Deep Blue
movies.synopsis: A diver turns into a mermaid for one day to save her sunken city from being drained, learning that water is more than just a home.

movies.title: The Silent Partner
movies.synopsis: A silent partner in a tech startup discovers his co-founder is building an algorithm to control stock markets, and must stop it without speaking a word.

movies.title: Firefly Lane
movies.synopsis: Two firefighters, one reckless and one by the book, race against time to save a burning skyscraper while navigating their own complicated past.

movies.title: Code Red
movies.synopsis: A virus is spreading through the global network, and a hacker has to physically travel to the server farm in Antarctica to upload the antidote.

movies.title: Kitchen Nightmares
movies.synopsis: A celebrity chef opens a restaurant in a small town and accidentally starts a feud with a local farmer who supplies the best ingredients.

movies.title: The Painted Lady
movies.synopsis: A magical painting that shows the future begins to predict its own destruction, and the artist who made it must paint over reality to stop it.

movies.title: Broken Glass
movies.synopsis: A woman wakes up in a hospital with no memory, finding out she is the sole witness to a murder, but no one believes she exists.

movies.title: Rhythm of the Night
movies.synopsis: Two dance instructors, one modern and one traditional, are forced to collaborate for a competition and find out their styles fit perfectly together.

movies.title: Solar Flare
movies.synopsis: A space station crew must survive a solar storm while realizing the storm isn't natural, but a weapon sent by a rival nation.

movies.title: The Clown's Laugh
movies.synopsis: A retired clown returns to the ring to find out his old jokes are causing people to laugh uncontrollably to death.

movies.title: Homecoming
movies.synopsis: A soldier returns home to find his family has moved on, but a local festival brings him face to face with the friends he left behind.

movies.title: Match Made
movies.synopsis: Two people who hate each other are matched by a dating app and agree to a blind date to get the other to cancel, but things don't go as planned.

movies.title: Dream Catcher
movies.synopsis: A young boy enters the dream world of his sleeping mother and must guide her consciousness back before she becomes trapped in a nightmare.

movies.title: The Ex-Files
movies.synopsis: A secret agent is forced to go undercover as a therapist to save his ex-wife, who has been kidnapped by a rogue faction.

movies.title: Blueprints for Tomorrow
movies.synopsis: A team of scientists discovers a formula for eternal life, but using it requires a sacrifice that none of them are willing to make.

movies.title: Summer Nights
movies.synopsis: A summer romance begins on a cruise ship where everyone is trying to escape a broken past, including the couple who meet in the pool.

movies.title: The Void
movies.synopsis: Soldiers fighting an alien invasion discover the aliens are actually refugees fleeing a war in another galaxy.

movies.title: The Bachelor's Bloopers
movies.synopsis: A bachelor contestant tries to sabotage the show to win the girl, but accidentally makes himself a fan favorite.

movies.title: The Silent Piano
movies.synopsis: A pianist who loses her hearing after an accident must find a new way to play music through vibration.

movies.title: Love Me Twice
movies.synopsis: A woman gets cursed to relive her first love every time she falls for someone new, until she learns the lesson behind it.

movies.title: The Beast Within
movies.synopsis: A young boy discovers he can transform into a giant wolf to fight off monsters attacking his village.

movies.title: The Final Cut
movies.synopsis: An editor tries to salvage a director's masterpiece, but the director wants to burn it all down for a new start.

movies.title: Blackout
movies.synopsis: During a city-wide power outage, a vigilante takes control of the grid to fight the rising crime rate.

movies.title: Paper Planes
movies.synopsis: Two pen pals exchange paper planes from opposite sides of the ocean, but one plane carries a secret that threatens to ruin their lives.

movies.title: The Space Station
movies.synopsis: A group of kids accidentally launch a rocket and find a station in space where time moves slower.

movies.title: The Heist of the Century
movies.synopsis: A master thief plans the ultimate robbery, but every member of his crew is a professional comedian trying to make a joke.

movies.title: The Memory Thief
movies.synopsis: A thief steals memories instead of objects, but steals a memory that reveals a government conspiracy.

movies.title: The Wedding Crashers
movies.synopsis: Two friends crash weddings to meet single women, but end up crashing a wedding where they have to help the bride get married.

movies.title: The Lost Generation
movies.synopsis: A documentary crew follows the lives of three veterans trying to reintegrate into society after 20 years in the military.

movies.title: Heartbreak Hotel
movies.synopsis: A couple opens a motel for broken hearts, where every room tells a story of loss and eventual healing.

movies.title: The Robot's Heart
movies.synopsis: A robot designed to clean houses gains sentience and questions whether cleaning is the best way to serve humanity.

movies.title: The Chase
movies.synopsis: A detective pursues a serial killer who leaves clues only the detective can solve, but the clues are personal to both of them.

movies.title: The Love Letter
movies.synopsis: A writer sends anonymous love letters to a man, but they both think the letters are coming from the wrong person.

movies.title: The Big Screen
movies.synopsis: A cartoon character is accidentally uploaded to the internet and has to fight the internet's trolls to stay popular.

movies.title: The Last Resort
movies.synopsis: A group of misfits are stuck in a small motel during a storm, and they have to learn to trust each other to survive.

movies.title: The Secret Agent
movies.synopsis: An intern tries to steal the secret agent to stop the criminal mastermind who hijacked all the drones in the city.

movies.title: The Time Loop
movies.synopsis: A group of thieves try to rob a bank, but the bank is run by robots who know all their moves.

movies.title: The Broken Promise
movies.synopsis: A father breaks a promise to his dying son, but tries to keep it alive by doing what he said he would do.

movies.title: The Dating Game
movies.synopsis: A game show host falls in love with a contestant who is actually a professional actor hired to be her.

movies.title: The Dragon's Egg
movies.synopsis: A young dragon lays an egg that hatches a human child, and the two must protect the egg from poachers.

movies.title: The Last Stand
movies.synopsis: A master thief plans the ultimate robbery, but every member of his crew is a professional comedian trying to make a joke.

movies.title: The Second Chances
movies.synopsis: Two ex-lovers meet 10 years later to find out if they can be together again, but the past is heavier than they expected.

movies.title: The Director's Cut
movies.synopsis: A young director discovers he can transform into a giant wolf to fight off monsters attacking his village.

movies.title: The Heist of the Century
movies.synopsis: A master thief plans the ultimate robbery, but every member of his crew is a professional comedian trying to make a joke.

movies.title: The Heist of the Century
movies.synopsis: A master thief plans the ultimate robbery, but every member of his crew is a professional comedian trying to make a joke.

movies.title: The Adventure of the Year
movies.synopsis: A group of animals find a treasure map and must follow it to find the treasure, but a shark is chasing them.

movies.title: The Final Countdown
movies.synopsis: A bomb squad member must disarm a bomb in a crowded stadium, but he has to navigate his own fears to do it.

movies.title: The Last Dance
movies.synopsis: Two people who hate each other are matched by a dating app and agree to a blind date to get the other to cancel, but things don't go as planned.

movies.title: The Robot's Heart
movies.synopsis: A young boy enters the dream world of his sleeping mother and must guide her consciousness back before she becomes trapped in a nightmare.

movies.title: The Secret Agent
movies.synopsis: A game show host falls in love with a contestant who is actually a professional actor hired to be her.

movies.title: The Love Boat
movies.synopsis: A cruise ship romance writer meets a passenger who is actually the subject of one of her books.

movies.title: The Last Hero
movies.synopsis: A couple in their 20s falls in love, but their families don't approve, and they have to fight for their relationship.

movies.title: The Heist
movies.synopsis: A cartoon star gets famous in the real world, but he has to learn to act like a human to keep his popularity.

movies.title: The Final Word
movies.synopsis: A writer receives a final letter from a dead friend that contains a clue to a murder, but the writer has to solve it alone.

movies.title: The Last Hero
movies.synopsis: A couple in their 20s falls in love, but their families don't approve, and they have to fight for their relationship.

movies.title: The Movie Maker
movies.synopsis: A cartoon star gets famous in the real world, but he has to learn to act like a human to keep his popularity.
